content_sha256_covers: For wow_packet_v0.2, sha256 over canonical JSON raw_packet_json with sorted keys. It does not cover rendered HTML, proof panels, manifests, raw email text, or OpenTimestamp status.
evidence_to_watch: Track supplier backlog, named OEM purchase orders, actuator ASP commentary, and delivery lead-time disclosures.

wow_items_json.claim: Actuator supplier lead times may become the first public bottleneck signal for humanoid robot production.
wow_items_json.evidence_to_watch: Track supplier backlog, named OEM purchase orders, actuator ASP commentary, and delivery lead-time disclosures.
wow_items_json.observation: Actuator supplier lead times may become the first public bottleneck signal for humanoid robot production.
wow_items_json.why_now: More robot OEM commentary is moving from demos to component availability and manufacturability.
wow_items_json.why_worth_watching: Actuator supplier lead times may become the first public bottleneck signal for humanoid robot production.

wow_items_json.claim: Legacy automation suppliers may benefit if robot OEMs outsource motion-control subsystems.

wow_items_json.observation: Legacy automation suppliers may benefit if robot OEMs outsource motion-control subsystems.
wow_items_json.why_now: Early physical AI deployments still require proven industrial-grade reliability.

wow_items_json.claim: On-device inference modules may become a second-order beneficiary of physical AI deployment.
wow_items_json.evidence_to_watch: Track module shipments, embedded AI design wins, and robot BOM disclosures.
wow_items_json.observation: On-device inference modules may become a second-order beneficiary of physical AI deployment.

wow_items_json.why_worth_watching: On-device inference modules may become a second-order beneficiary of physical AI deployment.
